description: Firm CRO Risk Board - synthesis layer rolling the eight firm risk engines into one worst-of posture, a binding-constraint readout, a limit-utilisation table, day-over-day deltas and a deterministic CRO brief. data/firm-risk-board.json.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Firm CRO Risk Board - daily 04:00 UTC via Amazon EventBridge Scheduler, after merger-arb-risk (03:30), so it always synthesises a complete fresh risk stack.
